req.title: Create patient (boundary)
req.statement: A registered clinician shall create a patient resource with validated demographics; creation with missing mandatory elements shall be rejected. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-026 mandates that a clinician can create a valid Patient resource (positive/EP), that creation with a missing mandatory element is rejected with HTTP 422 (negative/NEG+DT), and that boundary values on numeric/timestamp fields are exercised (boundary/BVA). A fourth test covers the state transition from non-existent to stored patient (STC). Each test is self-contained via a clinician-auth fixture and cleans up after itself via a delete helper.

tests.name: test_create_patient_valid_demographics
preconditions: No pre-existing patient with the same identifier
actions: Build a well-formed Patient payload with all mandatory FHIR R4 elements
expected: Response body contains a server-assigned id
trace: EP: valid partition of all mandatory fields present
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080/fhir"

def test_create_patient_valid_demographics(clinician_auth_headers, delete_resource):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Patient",
        "identifier": [{"system": "urn:test", "value": "EP-001"}],
        "name": [{"family": "Doe", "given": ["Jane"]}],
        "gender": "female",
        "birthDate": "1990-06-15"
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/Patient",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_auth_headers
    )
    created_id = resp.json().get("id")
    delete_resource("Patient", created_id)

    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["resourceType"] == "Patient"
    assert created_id is not None

tests.name: test_create_patient_missing_mandatory_name_returns_422
actions: Build a Patient payload omitting the mandatory 'name' element
expected: Response body contains an OperationOutcome with severity error
trace: NEG: invalid partition where required field is absent
DT: rule row — name absent => reject
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080/fhir"

def test_create_patient_missing_mandatory_name_returns_422(clinician_auth_headers):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Patient",
        "identifier": [{"system": "urn:test", "value": "NEG-001"}],
        "gender": "male",
        "birthDate": "1985-01-01"
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/Patient",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_auth_headers
    )

    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("resourceType") == "OperationOutcome"
    issues = body.get("issue", [])
    severities = [i.get("severity") for i in issues]
    assert "error" in severities

tests.name: test_create_patient_birthdate_boundary_minimum
actions: Build a Patient payload with birthDate set to the FHIR minimum date 0001-01-01
trace: R-HLT-026 -> boundary cases on timestamps must be tested
BVA: lower boundary of FHIR date type (0001-01-01)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080/fhir"

def test_create_patient_birthdate_boundary_minimum(clinician_auth_headers, delete_resource):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Patient",
        "identifier": [{"system": "urn:test", "value": "BVA-MIN-001"}],
        "name": [{"family": "Ancient", "given": ["One"]}],
        "gender": "unknown",
        "birthDate": "0001-01-01"
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/Patient",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_auth_headers
    )
    created_id = resp.json().get("id")
    delete_resource("Patient", created_id)

    assert resp.status_code == 201
    assert resp.json()["resourceType"] == "Patient"

tests.name: test_create_patient_birthdate_boundary_future_rejected
preconditions: System rejects birthDate values beyond today
actions: Build a Patient payload with birthDate set to 9999-12-31 (upper boundary beyond valid range)
trace: R-HLT-026 -> boundary cases on timestamps must be tested
BVA: upper boundary of birthDate — future date rejected
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080/fhir"

def test_create_patient_birthdate_boundary_future_rejected(clinician_auth_headers):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Patient",
        "identifier": [{"system": "urn:test", "value": "BVA-MAX-001"}],
        "name": [{"family": "Future", "given": ["Person"]}],
        "gender": "unknown",
        "birthDate": "9999-12-31"
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/Patient",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_auth_headers
    )

    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("resourceType") == "OperationOutcome"

tests.name: test_create_patient_state_transition_nonexistent_to_stored
preconditions: Target identifier STC-001 does not yet exist on the server
actions: Assert GET /Patient?identifier=urn:test|STC-001 returns empty bundle (pre-condition state)
POST /Patient with full valid payload and identifier STC-001
Assert GET /Patient/<id> returns the stored resource (post-condition state)
expected: Pre-state: resource not found (0 entries in search bundle)
Post-state: GET returns HTTP 200 with matching resourceType Patient
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080/fhir"

def test_create_patient_state_transition_nonexistent_to_stored(
    clinician_auth_headers, delete_resource
):
    identifier_value = "STC-001"
    search = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/Patient",
        params={"identifier": f"urn:test|{identifier_value}"},
        headers=clinician_auth_headers
    )
    assert search.status_code == 200
    assert search.json().get("total", 0) == 0, "Pre-condition: resource must not exist"

    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Patient",
        "identifier": [{"system": "urn:test", "value": identifier_value}],
        "name": [{"family": "Transition", "given": ["Test"]}],
        "gender": "male",
        "birthDate": "2000-03-22"
    }
    post_resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/Patient",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_auth_headers
    )
    assert post_resp.status_code == 201
    created_id = post_resp.json()["id"]
    delete_resource("Patient", created_id)

    get_resp = requests.get(
        f"{BASE_URL}/Patient/{created_id}",
        headers=clinician_auth_headers
    )
    assert get_resp.status_code == 200
    assert get_resp.json()["resourceType"] == "Patient"

tests.name: test_create_patient_decision_table_missing_gender_rejected
preconditions: gender is a mandatory element per local profile
actions: Build a Patient payload with name and birthDate present but gender omitted
expected: OperationOutcome references the missing gender element
trace: DT: rule row — name present, birthDate present, gender absent => reject
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:8080/fhir"

def test_create_patient_decision_table_missing_gender_rejected(clinician_auth_headers):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Patient",
        "identifier": [{"system": "urn:test", "value": "DT-001"}],
        "name": [{"family": "NoGender", "given": ["Patient"]}],
        "birthDate": "1975-09-10"
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{BASE_URL}/Patient",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_auth_headers
    )

    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("resourceType") == "OperationOutcome"
    diagnostics = " ".join(
        i.get("diagnostics", "") for i in body.get("issue", [])
    )
    assert "gender" in diagnostics.lower()
